C

COMMON - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the common rarity.
COMPLETION_NETHER_ROOF - Static variable in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.StarPlayer
 
CompletionCriteria - Class in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Represents Criteria needed to unlock a Cosmetic
CompletionCriteria(Predicate<Player>) - Constructor for class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Creates a new CompletionCriteria with no display and unlock criteria.
CompletionCriteria(Predicate<Player>, Predicate<Player>) - Constructor for class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Creates a new CompletionCriteria with no display.
CompletionCriteria(Predicate<Player>, Predicate<Player>, String, Object...) - Constructor for class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Creates a new CompletionCriteria.
CompletionCriteria(Predicate<Player>, Predicate<Player>, String, Object, Object[]) - Constructor for class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Creates a new CompletionCriteria with no display and unlock criteria.
CosmeticKey - Interface in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Parent Interface for Cosmetics.
CosmeticRarity - Enum in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Represents a rarity used in a Cosmetic.

F

fromCrafted(int, Collection<Material>) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.CRAFT_ITEM, using multiple.
fromCrafted(int, Material) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.CRAFT_ITEM.
fromCrafted(int, Material...) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.CRAFT_ITEM, using multiple.
fromKilled(int, EntityType) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.KILL_ENTITY.
fromMined(int, Collection<Material>) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.MINE_BLOCK, using multiple.
fromMined(int, Material) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.MINE_BLOCK.
fromMined(int, Material...) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.MINE_BLOCK, using multiple.
fromStatistic(Statistic, int) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with a Bukkit Statistic.

M

me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
Main StarCosmetics API Package
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Package relating to Cosmetics API.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure
Package relating to custom StarCosmetics Structures as Cosmetics.

OCCASIONAL - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity

of(Predicate<Player>) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with CompletionCriteria(Predicate).
of(Predicate<Player>, String, Object...) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with CompletionCriteria(Predicate, Predicate, String, Object, Object[]), with unlock criteria and criteria the same.
of(Predicate<Player>, Predicate<Player>, String, Object...) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with CompletionCriteria(Predicate, Predicate, String, Object, Object[]).
